nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project-specific guidance for AI coding agents, covering the worktree-based change workflow, architectural patterns to preserve (Decision/Choice system, Engine orchestrator, Agent protocol, bird power dispatcher), test conventions, and things to avoid. Serves as the authoritative contract between the codebase and any AI-assisted contributor.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary user-facing documentation covering setup, all CLI commands (play, dashboard, tournament, inspect, cloud, monitor), and pointers to deeper docs. The 8-section guide is the main entry point for new developers and users of the Wingspan simulator.

nodes.name: TODO.md
nodes.summary: Active task list tracking open work items across four areas: game-log display improvements for `wingspan play --log`, a training feature to bootstrap against a pre-trained opponent, a modeling change to use one-hots for round/cube counts, and general investigation topics requiring research reports.

nodes.name: cards.csv
nodes.summary: Master data table for all 180 Wingspan core-set bird cards, with one row per card capturing name, power text, point value, food costs by type, nest type flags, habitat flags, wingspan, egg limit, card color, and feature flags used by bonus cards and encoded as input features for the RL model.
nodes.languageNotes: 44-column CSV encoding a rich multi-dimensional card schema; the feature columns (px_*, bonus_*, flocking, predator, caches_food) are directly consumed by the encoder as binary and integer features.

nodes.name: coverage_baseline.txt
nodes.summary: Single-line file storing the current test coverage baseline percentage (85%), used by the quality gate script as a one-way ratchet — the gate fails if measured coverage drops below this value.

nodes.name: main.html
nodes.summary: Baseline HTML report for the neural network model architecture and parameter summary, generated by the `wingspan inspect` command. Presents layer-by-layer parameter counts, architecture diagrams, and decision-head tables in a styled single-page dashboard with interactive collapsible sections.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python package configuration defining the wingspan package (v0.1.0, Python 3.12+), runtime dependencies (PyTorch, Pydantic, rich, boto3), dev-only tooling (pytest, pyright, black, isort), the `wingspan` CLI entry point, and strict Pyright/black/isort/coverage settings used by the quality gate.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pyright strict mode with reportPrivateImportUsage=false to suppress torch stub noise; coverage configured for multiprocessing+thread concurrency to capture mp_collect worker output.
